name: Bahama Mamas
recipeIngredient: 1 can frozen orange juice (do not dilute)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, mix 2 cups boiling water with the orange jello and let cool.
2. Blend the frozen orange juice and frozen strawberries in a separate container.
3. Mix the remaining ingredients (rum, coconut rum) with the blended OJ and strawberries.
4. Pour the mixture into 2-ounce cups or a large pan and chill. If using a large pan, cut into smaller servings before serving.
Here are the shooters that Vickey sent Nancy Pallota (on the Country e-mail list). Vickey asks you to beware of the strength of these goodies and to consume them cautiously.
